case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. DANIELLE MARCIE et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARCIE, DANIELLE ,AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 875 POST STREET, RESIDENT MANAGER'S UNIT (UNIT 100), SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, **AND INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
